en.extract:
The slaty-headed longbill or grey-winged longbill (Toxorhamphus poliopterus) is a species of bird in the family Melanocharitidae. It is found in the New Guinea Highlands. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest.

[[File:Toxorhamphus poliopterus (cropped).jpg|thumb|illustration]]
The '''slaty-headed longbill''' or '''grey-winged longbill''' ('''''Toxorhamphus poliopterus''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Melanocharitidae]]. It is found in the [[New Guinea Highlands]]. Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]] and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]].
